name: Advisor Ω
ability: Each night, you learn two statements & choose one: it becomes true (if not true already).
flavor: It comes down to this, so it's up to you. All that's left: choose right.
firstNightReminder: Give two statements. The Advisor chooses one.
otherNightReminder: Give two statements. The Advisor chooses one.

name: Corpse Eater Ω
ability: If a good player was executed today, their Townsfolk neighbors are poisoned tonight & tomorrow day.
otherNightReminder: If a good player was executed today, mark their Townsfolk neighbors with Poisoned token.

name: Sol Ω
ability: If evil would win, but your 1st vote today was for the demon, good wins instead.

name: Train Conductor Ω
ability: You start knowing how many sources of poisoning & drunkeness is in-play.
firstNightReminder: Show how many sources of posion and drunking is in play. If a drunk in play they also learn this.

name: Vengeance Ω
ability: Each night*, the last player that nominated you dies, even if you are dead.
otherNightReminder: If a player nominated Vengeance, they die.

name: Veteran Ω
ability: Each night*, learn which players died. Once per game, you may choose 1 of these players: they live & you die instead.
flavor: I have fought my battles. These children, they are the future!!
otherNightReminder: Point to the players that died. Ask the veteran if they want to use their ability. If they do they choose a player, that player lives & the veteran dies
